title: InsideLLM Action Catalog Registration
description: Registration record for an action in the InsideLLM catalog. An agent manifest names an action_id; this record tells the runtime how to actually invoke it. Backends are deliberately polyglot (FastAPI, Celery, n8n, Activepieces, MCP) — see docs/Platform-Ultraplan-v3-GapAnalysis.md § Layer 3.

action_id.description: Stable, unique per tenant. snake_case. Referenced by agent manifests.

tenant_id.description: Tenant that owns this action. 'core' is a reserved tenant for actions shared across all tenants (Uniformedi-maintained).

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the agent builder's action picker.

description.description: What the action does, in plain language. Shown in the builder.

category.description: Coarse grouping for the builder's picker UI.

backend.description: Polyglot backend discriminated by type. Picked at action-registration time; agents do not see the backend.

url.description: HTTP endpoint invoked with the action's inputs as a JSON body.

task.description: Celery task name registered on insidellm-workers (e.g. 'actions.lookup_account').

hmac_secret_env.description: Env var name holding the shared secret for HMAC signing.

server.description: MCP server name registered in governance_mcp_servers.

tool_name.description: Tool name exported by that MCP server.

inputs.description: Input parameter map. Each key is the param name; value is a simple JSON-Schema subset. The runtime validates before invoking the backend and before OPA evaluation.

outputs.description: Output parameter map (same JSON-Schema subset as inputs). Used by the manifest → tool-call bridge to tell the agent the shape of the return value.

guardrail_requirements.description: Minimum guardrail posture required for any agent that lists this action. OPA evaluates: is the agent's profile ≥ minimum_guardrail_tier? Does the agent's dlp_overrides authorize touching data_classes?

data_classes.description: What classes of data this action touches. Drives DLP path + OPA eval.

minimum_guardrail_tier.description: Agents with a weaker profile cannot list this action (OPA rejects at manifest-publish time).

requires_approval.description: Forces approval_required=true regardless of what the agent manifest specifies. Use for write actions touching regulated data.

audit.description: Per-action audit policy. Overlays the platform default (log_inputs=true, log_outputs=true).

redact_fields.description: Dotted paths in inputs/outputs to redact before emitting to the audit chain.

rate_limit.description: Per-action invocation rate limit. Separate from the agent's overall rpm_limit.

maintainer.description: Who owns this action. 'uniformedi' for core catalog; company IT owner email for tenant-specific actions.

version.description: Semver. Breaking input/output change bumps major.

deprecated.description: Hidden from the builder picker but still invokable by already-published agents.
